title: The ability to sort items by unread updates
excerpt:
Is there any way to sort all items on board by the status of updates? 
If there is any unread (blue) updates, they go on top. 
More unread updates - higher the item goes.

posts.author: lanyere (Yerlan)
posts.cookedHtml:
